publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Taʾammǝra Māryām
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Hildephonsus (Dexius) of Toledo
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a rich man who cast a loaf to a beggar and was saved by the Virgin after being condemned by Jesus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the youth Zechariah, from Rome
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Phoenician evil man called Bārok
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary obtained forgiveness for a monk who mutilated himself after he had defiled himself
Miracle of Mary: How a bishop removed a priest from his office and how the Virgin Mary rebuked the bishop
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a poor widow and her son who became a thief and was crucified
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the virgin whom a magistrate wanted to corrupt
Miracle of Mary: The Story of the Cannibal of Qǝmr
Miracle of Mary: How the image of the Virgin Mary in a Church bowed to the monks
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an officer of Ephesus who was innocently crucified and saved by Mary
Miracle of Mary: How a bishop removed a priest from his office and how the Virgin Mary rebuked the bishop
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a sinful abbot who appears a year after his death to announce his salvation by Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Sophia, abbess of Mount Carmel
Miracle of Mary: How a widow forsook her duties in the Church and lived in sin, how her place had been filled by the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary and her Son appeared in a beehive
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Jew of ʾAḫmīm
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the scribe Damianus from Philippi
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Bishop of Rome, ʾAbbās (Short version)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of ʾArsimā, whom Mary announced that two girls would be exempted from wordly desires
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a sinful woman who swallowed a scorpion
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary administered to certain monks a celestial compound to digest their food
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary rebuked a woman who gave up fasting at her husband's command
Miracle of Mary: How a wealthy lady who dressed in mean attire to give alms was carried to Church by the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an evil officer at Tarsus in Cilicia who loved Mary and had an apparition of Jesus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Qirās, a brigand of Galatia, saved by Mary from hanging
Miracle of Mary: How a great king in Rome dedicated an altar to Virgin Mary and Her Child
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the sinful deacon ʾAstirās whom Mary ordered to be buried in the believers' graveyard
Miracle of Mary: How Nicodemus the Persian knight became a Christian
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Phoenician evil man called Bārok
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Bishop Philoteus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Anastasius, a deacon of Rome
Miracle of Mary: How the monk Gerdan obeyed the lust of the flesh and cut his own throat and how the Virgin Mary brought his soul back to his body
Miracle of Mary: How a shoemaker's daughter called Mary was taken possession of a horse-solder, who spared her virginity
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Jewish boy from Tyrus, saved by Mary from the furnace
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a pregnant woman
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a shipwrecked pilgrim
Miracle of Mary: How a man forsook his wife and loved another woman who was a worshipper of the Virgin Mary and repented
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Dina resurrected and released from the Hades by St. Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a hanged brigand resuscitated because he loved the Virgin
msItem.incipit: ፵ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ቡርክት፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበዕብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም፡
በረከታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን፨ ፨

ወሀለወት፡ አሐቲ፡ ብእሲት፡ ነዳይት፡ መበለት፡ ወባቲ፡ ወልደ፡ ወአልባቲ፡ ካልአ፡ ዘእንበሌሁ፨ ወእምብዝኃ፡ አፍቅሪታ፡ ኪያሁ፡ ወትስእላ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወታማኀፅ
ኖ፡ ኀቤሃ፡ ከመ፡ ትዕቀቦ፡ እምኵሎ፡ እኩይ፡ ወታድኅኖ፡ እምእከየ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ዓለም፨ ወኮነት፡ ታወትር፡ ሐዊረ፡ ኀበ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ወትስእል፡ በኵሉ፡ ልባ፨ ፨
msItem.explicit:
ወበዛቲ፡ ሰዐት፡ አውረደተኒ፡ እምላዕለ፡ ዕፅ፡ ወፈነወተኒ፡ ወትቤ
ለኒ፡ ሖር፡ ኀበ፡ እምከ፨ ወሶበ፡ ሰምዑ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ቃሎ፡ ሰብሕዎ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ወአእኰትዋ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ላዕለ፡ ዘገብረት፨ ወሶበ፡ ሰምዓ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፡ ዘንተ፡ ነገረ፡ ጸውዖሙ፡ ለሕፃን፡ ወለእሙ፡ ወአንበሮሙ፡ ኀቤሁ፨ ወኮነ፡ ይሁቦሙ፡ ሲሳዮሙ፡ ወአራዞሙ፡ በኵሉ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ሕይወቶሙ፡ በእንተ፡ ክብራ፡ ለድንግል፡ ንጽሕት፨ ፨
ጸሎታ፡ በስእለታ፡ ያሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ገብራ፡ አቡነ፡ ሉቃስ፡ ወልደ ጊዮርጊስ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ ኣሜን፨ ፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the youth Zechariah, from Rome
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Juliana and Barbara from Bethlehem
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Theodosia, sister of Constantine, who found the cross in Jerusalem
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary sent a vision to a young man and caused him to embrace the ascetic life
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary and our Lord became sureties to a Jew for the debt owed to him by a certain merchant of Constantinople
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the drunk monk Timotewos (?), saved by the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: How a woman consigned to the Devil the son she conceived on Easter eve
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary protected a philantropic merchant who had beggared himself
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary and St Peter saved from hell the souls of Peter the deacon and Stephen, two brothers from Constantinople
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered from hell the soul of an evil man who had intended to build a church in her name
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary enabled a man to slay a serpent from which he took a pearl
Miracle of Mary: How a bishop from St Peter's church in Rome stole holy oil and bought two pearls for Mary after having been rebuked
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the leprous Bishop Mercurius
Miracle of Mary: How an avaricious priest refused to leave the bed of a rich man to go to a dying woman
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary saved a young widow from a knight, who became a monk
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary converted a demented herdsman and delivered him from Satan
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a monk in the monastery of St. Ephrem, on an island in the river of Tigris
Miracle of Mary: How a knight loved a lady and prayed to Mary who appeared to him and how he became a monk
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary told a treasurer of a church to kiss her cheeks
Miracle of Mary: How a merchant denied Christ but not Mary, who saved him
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary caused a storm to cease and saved sheep and took the shepherd to Paradise
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary with shrouded face was seen by a collector of firewood who acquired wealth through her protection
Miracle of Mary: How the image of the Virgin Mary in a Church bowed to the monks
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a brigand who loved Mary and whose funeral she commanded to the bishop
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a picture of Mary speaking to a worker
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Bishop of Rome, ʾAbbās (Long version)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a baptized Jewish boy called Gǝrānin saved by Mary from fire
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary raised a dead knight to fight against Golyād
Miracle of Mary: How an Ishmaelite was converted when he saw oil and milk flowing from the breasts of a picture of the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary appeared to a young man and made him swear he would not marry and how he ran away after his father chose a bride and broke his neck
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary obtained forgiveness for a spendthrift because though he denied the Father, Christ, the Holy Ghost and the angels he would not deny her
msItem.incipit: ፸ወ፩ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ፍሥሕት፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበዕብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም፡
ጸሎታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን፨=፨
ወሀሎ፡ ፩ ወሬዛ፡ ሠናይ፡ እምክቡራነ፡ ዘመድ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወኮነ፡ ያፈቅር፡ በሊዐ፡ ወሰትየ፡ ወፈግዓ። ወእምድኅረ፡ ውእቱ፡ ኀልቀ፡ ንዋዩ፡ ወጸልእዎ፡ ፍቁራኒሁ፡ ወኮኑ፡ ይሣለቁ፡ ላዕሌሁ፨ ወአሐተ፡ ዕለተ፡ ወፅአ፡ አፍአ፡ እምሀገር፡ ወምስሌሁ፡ ፍቁሩ፡ እስመ፡ ፀበበቶ፡ ምድር፨=፨
msItem.explicit: ወነሥኦ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ወሬዛ፡ ወንሣእ፡ ሎቱ፡ ብእሲተ፡ ወአንበሮ፡ ውስተ፡ ቤትከ፡ እስመ፡ ትትዓሠይ፡ ብዙኃ፨=፨ ወሖረ፡ ውእቱ፡ ባዕል፡ ኀበ፡ ወሬዛ፡ ወአንቅሖ፡ ወሐቀፎ፡ ወሰዐሞ፡ ወወሰዶ፡ ውስተ፡ ቤቱ፡ ወወሀቦ፡ ወለቶ፡ ወአስፈኖ፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሉ፡ ንዋዩ፨ ወሐይወ፡ ሕይወተ፡ ኄራን፡ ወሞተ፡ ሞተ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ በስእለታ፡ ለእመ፡ ብርሃን፡
ጸሎታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨=፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary saved a lady from adultery by causing her to read the Prayers for the Dead and appeared to her
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered from the devils the soul of an avaricious farmer who had given alms in her name
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Jew of Constantinople punished for throwing out an image of Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary forgave a lady who commited incest with her son and murdered their child
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a prince saved by Mary after being punished for having wrongly assigned an abbot
Miracle of Mary: How a young man placed a ring on the finger of a figure of the Virgin Mary, who regarded it as a ring of betrothal
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of sunken ship saved by Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the painted figures of Christ and the Virgin Mary bled when a Jew cast the board into a pit, how the magistrate burned the Jew alive
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a knight who denied Jesus but not Mary and was saved by her intercession
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary saved the soul of a monk who was crossing a stream to visit a lover
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a sinful widow who went to hell and later appeared at her convent and announced her salvation by Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracles of the apparition of the Virgin to a sculptor and St Basil
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary made the tears of a sinful maiden to outweigh her sins
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a European man with a petrified foot
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary, when twelve years old, healed an epileptic
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the source caused by Jesus and healing by its water
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a brigand who bathed in "the water of the Virgin" and whose soul was saved by Her
Miracle of Mary: The brigands who killed each other at the miraculous spring
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a widow whom Mary told never to recite the greeting of the angel in hurry
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman who prayed for a child and sees three sons in an apparition
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman who despite her mother-in-law adored a torn image of Mary
Miracle of a sick man in a hospital whom Mary carries to Jerusalem
msItem.incipit: ፺ወ፫ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበዕብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም፡
ጸሎታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን፨

ይቤ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፡ አነ፡ ነዳይ፡ በገዳመ፡ አስቄጥስ፡ በደብረ፡ ነጋድያን፡ አዘዘኒ፡ መምህር፡ ከመ፡ እትለአኮሙ፡ ለሕሙማን፨ ወሀሎ፡ ሥዕል፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ በቤተ፡ ሕሙማን፡ መንገለ፡ ምሥራቅ፡ ዘለለጽባሕ፡ ይትመኀፀኑ፡ ባቲ፡ ሕሙማን፨ ወሀሎ፡ ሕሙም፡ ዘነበረ፡ ጕንዱየ፡ መዋዕለ፡ በሕማም፡ ወይስእላ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ እንዘ፡ ይብል፡ ኢትንሥእኒ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ እብጻሕ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም፡ ወእስዓም፡ ኀበ፡
ቆመ፡ እግዚእነ፡፨=፨
msItem.explicit: ወአብጽሐቶ፡ ኀበ፡ ዮርዳኖስ፡ ወአጥመቀቶ፡ ወአዕረገቶ፡ ደብረ፡ ዘይት፡ ወደብረ፡ ጽዮን፨=፨ ወትቤሎ፡ ኢትሕዘን፡ ነዋ፡ ፈጸምኩ፡ ለከ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዘሰአልከኒ፡ ወእምድኅረ፡ በዐለ፡ ልደተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ እነሥአከ፡ መስሌየ፡ ወአስተፈሥሐከ፡ ወገብረት፡ በከማሁ፡ ወአዕረፈ፡ በሰላም፨=፨
ኦእዝእትነ፡ ጸሎትኪ፡ ወስእለትኪየ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨=፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: St Basil and the rich man who refused to give him a tablet [sāledā] for an icon of St Mary.
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary when at Bethlehem healed king Safron and drove out devils
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the healing of a handicapped man
Miracle of Mary: The Virgin Mary and the man who went mad
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary made a stream to reverse its course
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary caused the spirits of Macarius and others to appear to the monks of Scete
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary forgave Mary the Egyptian harlot
Miracle of Mary: After a man denies Christ and Mary, his wife prays before the image of Mary, who appears then to the husband
msItem.incipit: ፻ወ፩ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበዕብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም፨-፨

ወሀሎ፡ ፩ ብእሲ፡ ውስተ፡ አሐቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ምስለ፡ ብእሲቱ፡ ወክቡራን፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ወነበሩ፡ ክልኤሆሙ፡ እንዘ፡ ይገብሩ፡ ተዝካራ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘምስለ፡ ወልዳ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ። ወተፀነሱ፡ እሙንቱ፡ ወኃጥኡ፡ ዘይገብሩ፡ ተዝካራ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለወልዳ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወዘይሴሰዩ፨-፨ ወሀለየ፡ ውእቱ፡ ብእሲ፡ ምክረ፡ ዘይገብር፡ በልቡ፡ ወይቤ፡ እምዝ፡ ሐይው፡ ይኄይሰኒ፡ ሰሪቅ፡ ወሚመ፡ ክሒደ፡ ፈጣሪየ፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ምስለ፡ እሙ፡ ድንግል፡ ማርያም፡ ወክሕዶ፡ ለክርስቶስ፡ ምስለ፡ እሙ፡ ወአምነ፡ ሰይጣነ፡ ወገነየ፡ ሎቱ፨
msItem.explicit:
ወርእየ፡ ውእቱ፡ ብእሲ፡ በግርማ፡ ዐቢይ፡ ወደንገፀ፡ ወትቤሎ፡ ለምንት፡ ክህድከ፡ ኪያየ፡ ወወልድየ፡ ወአመንከ፡ ሰይጣነ፡ ዘይከውን፡ በከ፨ ወይቤ፡ አመንኪ፡ በአብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወበማርያም፨-፨ ወትቤሎ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ተንሥእ፡ ወእቱ፡ ቤተከ፡ ምስለ፡ ብእሲትከ፡ እስመ፡ ሀለወት፡ ነዊማ፡ ታሕተ፡ ሥዕልየ፡ ኀበ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ወነስሕ፡ ኀ
በ፡ ፩ ካህን፡ ወግድፍ፡ ብዕለ፡ ሰይጣን፨-፨ ወገደፈ፡ ውእቱ፡ ብእሲ፡ ወሐይወ፡ ሕይወተ፡ ኄራን፡ ወሞተ፡ ብሰላም፡
ጸሎታ፡ ለእግዝትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ያሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ገብራ፡ ፍቁረ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ አሜን፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: St Mary saves two travellers from floods and soldiers
msItem.incipit: ፻ወ፪ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበዕብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም፨

ወሀሎ፡ ፩ ወሬዛ፡ ዘይነብር፡ ውስተ፡ አሐቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ወኮነ፡ ይፈርሆ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ልዑል፡ ወያፈቅራ፡ ለእግእዝትነ፡ ማርያም፡ በኵሉ፡ ልቡ፡ ወይትአመን፡ ረድኤተ፡ ዚአሃ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ ወይረክብ፡
በጸሎታ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዘኀሠሠ፡ ወኵሎ፡ ዘተመነየ፨ ወበአሐቲ፡ ዕለት፡ ለአኮ፡ አቡሁ፡ ኀበ፡ አሐቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ምስለ፡ ፩ ወሬዛ፡ ዘከማሁ፨-፨ ወውእቱሰ፡ ዘመን፡ መዋዕለ፡ ክረምት፡ ወይዘንም፡ ብዙኀ፡ ዝናም፡ ወአፍለግኒ፡ ምሉአን፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ወይትኄየሉ፡ ጥቀ፨-፨
msItem.explicit: ወበጊዜሃ፡ ቦአ፡ ፍርሃት፡ ውስተ፡ ልቡ፡ ወይቤሎሙ፡ ለምንት፡ ትጐይዩኒ፡ ወይእዜኒ፡ ኀደጉክሙ፡ በእንተ፡ ፍቅራ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወሖረ፡ ሶቤሃ፡ ፍኖቶ፡ እንዘ፡ ኢይነክዮሙ፡ ምንተኒ፨ ወውእቱኒ፡ ወሬዛ፡ ሰብሖ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ልዑል፡ ወአእኰታ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወአንከረ፡ እምዕበየ፡ ተአምር፡ ዘገብረት፡ ላዕሌሁ፡ በኀይለ፡ ጸሎታ፡ ወአተወ፡ ብሔሮ፡ እንዘ፡ ይትፌሣሕ፡
ጸሎታ፡ ወበረከታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ገብራ፡ መልከ፡ ጼዴቅ፡ አሜን፨-፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a French painter whose scaffold was overthrown by the devil
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the construction of a church in Jericho
Miracle of Mary: An abbot in Scete sees first a multitude of demons, then a multitude of saints
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered a Muslim from prison and how he escaped to Cyprus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a rich man from Qʷalāsis who fought the Qʷǝz and whose eye was pierced by an arrow
Miracle of Mary: The girl who was going to be stoned after she was caught committing fornication
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary fed the starving monks
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary smote a satan who was trying to corrupt a monk
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a poor monk whom Mary gave a garment
Miracle of Mary: The Virgin Mary and the wife who was an adultress
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary healed a leper on the day of her festival
Miracle of Mary: The king's washerman who was attacked by a lion
Miracle of Mary: A young man whom his mother had vowed to the service of St Mary becomes impotent when his parents try to wed him
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered from prison a wrongly accused governor
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a poor man who wanted to build a Chapel to Mary and of the buried pot of gold pieces
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary fought against an ape and delivered a huntsman from death
Miracle of Mary: How an image of the Virgin Mary wept for the sins of the world
Miracle of Mary: The man who wanted to give a banquet on St Mary's feast but was unable because of a famine
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary healed a sick man by anointing him with her spittle
Miracle of Mary: How the monks of a certain monastery reviled their abbot, whom the Virgin Mary carried to paradise
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a bandit saved by Mary after having stolen from churches
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a fisherman who adored the Virgin Mary and was saved from snake
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary obtained entry to paradise for the soul of a monk who had kept her fast annually
Miracle of Mary: A sinner is saved from damnation because he had built a shrine in the name of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: The hungry man whom St Mary used to feed
Miracle of Mary: A soldier redeems the Child Jesus from another soldier who was thinking of handing him over to King Herod
Miracle of Mary: How a man collapsed whilst on his way to receive the Eucharist
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary kept alive miners buried in a fall of earth
msItem.incipit: ፻ወ፴ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ንግሥት፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበዕብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም።=።

ወኮነ፡ በብሔረ፡ አፍሩርጊ፡ በአሐቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ሀሎ፡ ደብር፡ ልዑል፡ ወውስተ፡ ከርሡ፡ ለደብር፡ ይነብር፡ ወርቅ፡ ብዙኅ፡ ወይመጽኡ፡ ሰብአ፡ ሀገር፡ ወይከርዩ፡ እምውስቴቱ፡ ወይረክቡ፡ ወርቀ፡ ብዙኃ፨=፨ ወሀሎ፡ ውስተ፡ ይእቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ፩ነዳይ፡ ወ
አልቦቱ፡ ምንተኒ፡ ወፅኑስ፡ ፈድፋደ፡ እምንዋየ፡ ዝዓለም፨=፨ ዳእሙ፡ ሶበ፡ ይመጽኡ፡ ሰብአ፡ ሀገር፡ ኀበ፡ ውእቱ፡ ደብር፡ ወይከርዩ፡ ወይነሥኡ፡ ወርቅ፡ በከመ፡ እቤ፡ ቀዳሚ፨
msItem.explicit:
ወውእቱሰ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘአድኀነቶ፡ እሞት፡ ኀደገ፡ ዘንተ፡ ዓለመ፡ ወኮነ፡ መነኮሰ፡ ወብእሲቱኒ፡ ከማሁ፡ መነኮሳይተ፡ ወነበሩ፡ ክልኤሆሙ፡ ኅቡረ፡ እንዘ፡ ይትለአክዋ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ በልብ፡ ንጹሕ፡ ወበሕሊና፡ ሠናይ፡ ወይገብሩ፡ በዕላ፡ እስከ፡ አመ፡ አዕረፉ፡ ወፈለሱ፡ እምዝንቱ፡ ወወረሱ፡ መንግሥተ፡ ሰማያት፡ በስእለታ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ምልእተ፡ ሣህል፡ ወምሕ
ረት፡ ወላዲተ፡ ፍሥሐ፡
ወበረከት፡ ጸሎታ፡ ወስእለታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ገብራ፡ አቡነ፡ ሉቃስ፡ ወምስለ፡ ኵልነ፡ ውሉደ፡ ጥምቀት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨=፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: Patriarch Abraham and the interpretation of the parable of the mustard seed
Miracle Cycle of Teklā
Miracle of Mary: Thecla is taken to Alexandria to see her brother, ʾabbā ʾEsi, in a boat guided by the Archangels Gabriel and Sureyal

incipit.hi: ፻፴ወ፪፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበእብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም።

msItem.incipit: ጸሎታ፡ ወስእለታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን፨=፨

ወኮነት፡ ተአምረ፡ ዘገብረት፡ ላቲ፡ ለቅድስት፡ ቴክላ፡ አመ፡ ተሐውር፡ ብሔረ፡ እለክድርያ፡ ኀበ፡ እኁሃ፡ አባ፡ ኤሲ፨ ወሶበ፡ በጽሐት፡ ቅድስት፡ ቴክላ፡ ኀበ፡ ሀመር፡ ተቀበልዋ፡ መላእክት፡ እለ፡ ሀለዉ፡ ምስሌሃ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ተመሲሎሙ፡ ኖትያተ፡ ወጾሩ፡ ላቲ፡ ንዋየ፡ በሀመር፡ ወነጸፉ፡ ላቲ፡ በገቦ፡ እማንቱ፡ አንስ
ት፡ ቡሩካት፡ ወሖሩ፡ ወፈትሑ፡ ሀመሮሙ፡
msItem.explicit: ወእምዝ፡ አውሥአት፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ እመ፡ ሕይወት፡ ወትቤ፡ ነበረ፡ ሊተ፡ ወልድ፡ ባሕቲቱ፨ ወነሥእዎ፡ እምኔየ፡ በቅንዓት፡ ወሰቀልዎ፡ ዲበ፡ ዕፀ፡ መስቀል፨ ወአውሥአቶን፡ ቴክላ፡ ወትቤ፡ በአማን፡ እግዚእትየ፡ ናሁ፡ ረከበተክን፡ ምንዳቤ፡ ዐቢይ፨ ወባሕቱ፡ እፈቅድ፡ ትንግርኒ፡ እም፡ አይ፡ ሀገር፡ አንትን፨ ወይቤላሃ፡ ንሕነ፡ እምኢየሩሳሌም፡ ሀገረ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለዓለም፡ አሜን፨

ጸሎታ፡ ወስእለታ
የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን። ቁም፡ በዝየ፡ ከመ፡ ኢይኩን፡ ዝንጋዔ።=።=፡

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: St Mary incenses Thecla
msItem.incipit: ብዙኅ፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትየ፡ ማርያም፨

ወትቤላ፡ ቴክላ፡ እግዝእትየማርያም፨ እምድኅረ፡ ወለድክዎ፡ መጽኡ፡ ሐራ፡ ሄሮድስ፡ ከመ፡ ይቅትልዎ፡ ለወልድየ፡ ፍቁር፨ ወአነ፡ ነሣእኩዎ፡ ወጐየይኩ፡ ውስተ፡ ምድረ፡ ግብጽ፨ ወኮነ፡ ወልድየ፡ ንዑሰ፡ ይጠቡ፡ ሐሊበ፡ እምአጥባትየ፨ ወሶበ፡ ተፈጸመ፡ ሎቱ፡ ፴ወ፫ክረምት፡ ነሥእዎ፡ አይሁድ፡ እምኔየ፡ ወሰቀልዎ፡ ዲበ፡ ዕፅ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሐዘ፡ ኮነ፡ በላዕሌየ፨
msItem.explicit:
ወአውሥአት፡ ቴክላ፡ ወትቤ፡ ም
ንትኑ፡ ትገብሩ፡ ውስተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ዕፍረት፡ እስከ፡ ይከውን፡ ከመዝ፡ እስመ፡ አነ፡ ኢርኢኩ፡ ዘከመ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ግሙራ፨ ወትቤላ፡ እግዝእት፡ እመ፡ ሕይወት፡ ኡይከል፡ ይርስቦ፡ በዝንቱ፡ ዕፍረት፡ ወኢመኑሂ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ እለ፡ ተደለዉ፡ ለመርዓ፡ ሕይወት፡ ዘወልድየ፨ ወቴክላ፡ ኖመት፡ ንዋመ፡ ጥዑመ፡ እምጣዕመ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ጼና፡ ዕፍረት፨
ጸሎታ፡ ያምዕዞ፡ ለአቡነ፡ ሉቃስ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: Mary leads Teklā to Alexandria
msItem.incipit: ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፨

ወእምድኅረ፡ ዝንቱ፡ በሳኒታ፡ በጽሑ፡ ኀበ፡ ሀገር፡ እንተ፡ ስማ፡ ጣዋ፨ ወትቤሎ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ለመልአክ፡ ገብርኤል፡ አቁምኬ፡ ለሐመር፡ ዝየ፡ እስመ፡ አነ፡ እፈቅድ፡ እዕርግ፡ ውስተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መካን፨ ወሶበ፡ አቆምዋ፡ ለሐመር፡ ተንሥኡ፡ ሶቤሃ፡ ወወጽኡ፡ ውስተ፡ ሀገር፡ ወነሥኡ፡ ቴክላሃ፡ ምስሌሆሙ፡ ወበጽሑ፡ ውስተ፡ ይእቲ፡ መኰንነ፡ ሀገር፨
msItem.explicit: ወናሁ፡ አጽናዕኩ፡ ሥጋኪ፡ ወአዝዝከዎ፡ ለሱርያል፡ መልአክ፡ በትእዛዘ፡ ወልድየ፡ ፍቁር፡ ከመ፡ ይኩን፡ ምስሌክሙ፡ ወያጽንዕከሙ፡ ወይዕቀብ፡ ሥጋክሙ፡ እስከ፡ አመ፡ ትፌጽሙ፡ ገድለክሙ፡ በሰላመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፨ ሰላመ፡ ወልድየ፡ ፍቁር፡ ዘወሀበ፡ ለአርዳኢሁ፡ ንጹሓን፡ ይኩን፡ ምስሌክሙ፨ ወእምዝ፡ ሰአመታ፡ ወአስተፋነወታ፡ ወእግዝእትነሰ፡ ማርያም፡ አርገት፡ ውስተ፡ ሰማያት፡ በዐቢይ፡ ስብሐት፨

ጸሎታ፡
ወስእለታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ቴዎድርስ፡ አቡነ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨=፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: Miracle of George the Younger, who was delivered from prison
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Yoḥannǝs Kǝmā who founded a Convent
Miracle of a sick man in a hospital whom Mary carries to Jerusalem
msItem.incipit: ፻፴ወ፭ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡
በረከታ፡ ጸሎታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን ፨

ስሞዑ፡ አበውየ፡ ወአኀውየ፡ ዘንተ፡ ነገረ፡ ዘኮነ፡ በእንተ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ እመ፡ ምሕረት፡ ሰማዒት፡ ለዘ፡ ሰአላ፡ ወመሥተፍሥሒት፡ ለሕዙናን፨ በአማን፡ ተወክፈት፡ ለዘ፡ ሰአላ፡ በጥቡዕ፡ ልብ፡ ወበጽኑዕ፡ ሃይማኖት፨ ወእንዘ፡ ሀሎኩ፡ አነ፡ ነዳይ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ እስቁፍ፡ በገዳመ፡ አስቄጥስ፡ በደብረ፡ ነጋድያን፨ አዘዘኒ፡ መምህር፡ ከመ፡ እትለአኮሙ፡ ለሕሙማን፨
msItem.explicit:
ወአዕረገቶ፡ ኀበ፡ ደብረ፡ ዘይት፡ ወደብረ፡ ጽዮን፡ ወኀበ፡ ደብረ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ምስለ፡ አርዳኢሁ፡ ወትቤሎ፡ ኢትሕዘን፡ ነዋ፡ ፈጸምኩ፡ ለከ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዘሰአልከኒ፨ ወእምድኅረ፡ በዓለ፡ ልደት፡ እነሥአከ፡ ምስሌየ፡ ወተፈሥሐ፡ ወከማሁ፡ ኮነ፡ ወአዕረፈ፡ በሠናይ። ርእዩኬ፡ ኦአኀውየ፡ ፍቁራን፡ መርዔቱ፡ ለክርስቶስ፡ ዛቲ፡ ድንግል፡ ሰማዒት፡ ለሕዙናን፡ ወተወካፊተ፡ ስእለ
ት፡ ለዘሰአለ፡ በጥቡዕ፡ ልብ፡ ትሰምዖ፡ ስእለቶ፨
ጸሎታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ሉቃስ፡ አቡነ፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፨=፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the water reservoir at the Convent of Mǝṭmāq
Miracle of Mary: Bishop Michael sends Deacon John to help the monks of Dabra Mǝṭmāq celebrate Passion Week
Miracle of Mary: Yǝsḥaq, prior of Dabra Mǝṭmāq, who fled to Scete to escape the burden of his office
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the monk Yoḥannǝs (?) of St Macarius who had visions of the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Mark, son of the king of Rome, Gabra ʾIyasus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the patriarch Denis who asked from the Virgin to know the grave of Mark
Miracle of Mary: The son of a Muslim ruler of Egypt blasphemes the icon of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two scribes who were brothers
Miracle of the church built on the tomb of St Mary that will turn into a ship
Miracle of Mary: A priest is warned by an angel not to rush when incensing the icon of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the old priest Qaṭīr at ʾƎlkǝsus (al-Khusus)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two brothers Tāg and Nazīb from Dalgā
Miracle of Mary: An Arab who contemns St Mary's icon at Dabra Qalamon is punished
Miracle of Mary: The devout Muslim who became a Christian when St Mary appeared to him
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the sinful deacon ʾAstirās whom Mary ordered to be buried in the believers' graveyard
Miracle of Mary: The Arab woman who suffered from an issue of blood for many years
Miracle of Mary: The lamp before the icon of St Mary that the priest tipped over
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two monks Sadaqā and Ṗeṭros (?) of the Convent of St Victor
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Bifāmon of ʾAwsim who had an apparition of Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a man without virtue who loved Mary
Miracle of Mary: The man who accepted fine clothes as a bribe for future favors
Miracle of Mary: A plague in a monastery is halted at the prayer of a monk
Miracle of Mary: St Mary stops a pestilence
Miracle of Mary: Miracles performed by Mary after her death on various women
msItem.incipit: ፻፶ወ፱፡ ተአምሪሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ድንግል፡ ማርያም፡ ዘበዕብራይስጢ፡ ማሪሃም፡
ጸሎታ፡ ወበረከታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ አቡነ፡ ሉቃስ፡ ለዓለም፡ አሜን፨=፨

ስምዑ፡ አበውየ፡ ወአኀውየ፡ ዘገብረት፡ እግዝእትነ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ዕረፍታ፨ ወከመዝ፡ ገብረት፡ ተአምራተ፡ ወመንክራተ፡ ዘአልቦ፡ ኆልቈ፡ እስመ፡ ተወልደ፡ እምኔሃ፡ ዘወረደ፡ እምሰማይ፡ ወተሰገወ፡ ወረሰያ፡ ቤተ፡ መቅደስ፡ ለክብረ፡ ዚአሁ፨ ወከመዝ፡ ይሁብ፡ ስብሐተ፡ ሰብአ፡ ቤተ፡ መቅደሳ፡ ለቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ ማርያም፡ ወዓዲ፡ አንስትኒ፡ ይመፅኣ፡ ኀቤሃ፡ እምኵሉ፡ በሐውርት፡ እምሮሜ፡ ወእምእልስክንድርያ፡ ወአዋልደ፡ ነገሥት፡
msItem.explicit: ወካዕበ፡ መፅአት፡ ብእሲት፡ እምድረ፡ ግብጽ፡ እንተ፡ ትፈጽን፡ ዓቢየ፡ ፈጸንተ፡ ወሰገደት፡ ቅድሜሃ፡ ለማርያም፨ ወሶቤሃ፡ ተፈወሰት፡ እምደዌ፡ ፈጸንታ። ወካልእታኒ፡ ብእሲት፡ እንተ፡ አዖራ፡ ጋኔን፡ ዓይና፡ ዘየማን፡ ወፅአት፡ ኀበ፡ ማርያም፡ አስተብቍዓታ፡ ወትቤላ፡ መሐርኒ፡ ወእግዝእትነ፡ አንበረት፡ እዴሃ፡ ላዕለ፡ ዓይና፡ ወሐይወት፡ በይእቲ፡ ሰዓት፨
ጸሎታ፡ ወበረከታ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ አቡነ፡ ቴዎድሮስ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨

msItem.title: Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a possessed woman who is healed by Mary

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation by the library in the upper right corner. The first and last leaf, both referred to as in the library's digitization, are very probably part of the modern binding.

collation.signatures: The quire structure is difficult to discern. Repairs are visible.

layout.ab: Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.

handNote.desc: The script is described in Äthiopische PaläographieÄthiopistische ForschungenSiegbertUhligStuttgartFranz Steiner Verlag GmbH1988Äthiopistische Forschungen2222CodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988PalaographieCodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988Palaographie378-382.

The script is described in Äthiopische PaläographieÄthiopistische ForschungenSiegbertUhligStuttgartFranz Steiner Verlag GmbH1988Äthiopistische Forschungen2222CodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988PalaographieCodicologyEthiopicPalaeographybm:Uhlig1988Palaographie378-382. It might be slightly more ancient than .

decoNote.desc: Full-page multichrome frame composed of geometric elements.

item.q:
ብዕለ፡ ክርስቶስ።
በንዋዩ፡ ሶበ፡ አገበሮ፡ ፍቅረ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ከመ፡ ይኩኖ፡ ለመድኃኒተ፡ ነፍሱ፡ ወሥጋሁ። ወድኅረ ኒ፡ ወሀቦ፡ ለታቦተ፡ ዘግሑስ። ወሎቱኒ፡ ኢትርስእዎ፡ በጸሎትክሙ፡ ቅድስት። እስመ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ጻድቅ፡ ትክል፡ ወታሰልጥ።

item.desc: The note states that the manuscript belongs to the church of Madḫāne ʿĀlam.
The names of Luqās,Tewodros, Ṣǝyon Kǝbrā and Fǝre Ḥǝḍān are mentioned.
The name of Gabra Ḥawāryāt is mentioned.
The name of Malka Ṣedeq is mentioned.
The name of Tomās is mentioned.
The name of Takla Mikāʾel is mentioned.
In some places, the names of Walda Giyorgis, Walda Śǝllāse and Walatta Kidān have been substituted at a comparatively recent period.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Identified all miracles, added selected incipits and explicits
